content:
im kinda undecided if i wanna pull gmurphy, mouch or vort in the daily banners, got only like 120 pulls saved up but havent done the saya story yet which i think gives some?
new player, finished ch5, lv36
from what ive heard gmurphy is really good but kinda requires a lot of investment? i like her aesthetic but her actual mechanics seem a bit like a pain w the sacrifice thing unless im missing something?
ive been using a stolen maxxed mouch a bit and she seems p cool and seems like it'd be possible to slot her w characters i alry have. guide says she needs e3 tho which im prolly not getting soon? also tbh not the biggest fan of her aesthetic/personality
i think im leaning the most towards vort atm since both her mechanics and aesthetics appeal to me but if the new player guide is to be believed, i have basically none of the characters that work well with her lmao. could maybe do some caro+aquor thing somehow since caro is where most of my investment went till now, got sanga murphy celeste but all e0 and very not upgraded

so yea any info/help welcome :D
thread_title: Help Me Decide Who to Pull

content:
(I'm still relatively new, so take this w/ a grain of 🧂)
- GMurphy does want heavy investment (at E3, she's still mostly a support character <:Gmurphy_peek:1468257868959453305>), including specific blue team mates (although that's mostly for DTide / after clearing Chapter 9)

- If you don't like Mouch's aesthetic, it's just gonna make using her more painful and contribute to burnout regardless of how strong she is <:Nymph_dead:1356082627509092372>  (*SHINING TORNAAAAAAADO* 🌟 🌪️)

- Vort works very well with minimal dupes (I cleared Chapter 9 with her at lvl 60, E0) - even endgame, she can work at E1; she pairs well with regular Murphy, who you already have <:Murphy_satisfy:1468258389850193960>  **you NEED to unlock her posse though in order for her to work** (costs 3 reality verge)

for the Saya story, you'll get another 150 pulls after clearing that (it's 1 fight where you can borrow a 🐳 carry, and the rest is story nodes you can skip and go back to reread later if you want <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>)

**my advice would be to pull for 1 copy of Vortice**.  if you want GMurphy later down the line, you can always pull heavily for her when she gets a normal rerun and/or during the full anniversary in Nov
thread_title: Help Me Decide Who to Pull

content: GMurphy's wheel is really good though, so if you *do* finish Saya's story event before her rerun, you could try throwing some pulls onto GMurphy's banner to try for her wheel - and the pity carries over to Vort's 24 hour banner
thread_title: Help Me Decide Who to Pull

content: and if you do get GMurphy herself, there's the option of saving your prototype horizons from the shop for a few months to uncap her with
thread_title: Help Me Decide Who to Pull

content:
---
if you find yourself enjoying Vortice, regular Murphy (Vort BFF) has a normal rerun on the 15th lasting for a month and benefits from having her E1, so that's another option if you have leftover pulls
